history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark, stylized game UI screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner above a profile and level progress panel.

The main subject is a rectangular “level up” interface with a circular avatar on the left, large level and experience values in the center, and progress details below.

The setting is an on-screen graphic UI with a dark purple background and a smooth gradient, without any real-world environment visible. The lighting is purely digital, with bright text and colored progress elements standing out against the dark theme.

Visual Details: At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in gold with small decorative diamond shapes on both sides. In the main panel, the heading “alok ep ep” appears near the top center-left, with a small gold pill containing “#314” to its right. Below the name, the label “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller text. A circular avatar image sits on the left side, bordered with a purple ring. In the center, there is a rounded box labeled “LEVEL” with a large number “2” inside. To the right, a larger rounded box shows “EXPERIENCE” above the fraction “19 / 150” in white and teal coloring. Beneath these boxes is a horizontal progress bar with a purple fill on the left and a small “12%” displayed on the right end. Further down, three smaller rounded boxes display “MESSAGES 31” on the left, “XP NEEDED 131” in the middle, and “NEXT LVL 3” on the right. Very faint text at the bottom reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” though it is subtle and partially obscured by the background.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
alok ep ep
#314
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
2
EXPERIENCE
19 / 150
12%
MESSAGES
31
XP NEEDED
131
NEXT LVL
3
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary: The image displays a “Level Up” game interface with a profile name and a progress dashboard. It shows the user at Level 2 with 19/150 experience, 12% progress, and remaining XP to reach the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

- **LEVEL UP!**

## Profile / Progress Panel

- **Section:** LEVEL PROGRESS

### Level & Experience

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
